intro: Achillea millefolium, also known as yarrow, is a popular herb used to make a soothing and calming infusion. The infusion is made by steeping dried yarrow flowers in hot water, which releases its active compounds and provides a range of health benefits, including reducing inflammation and promoting relaxation. Drinking yarrow infusion may also help to ease digestive issues and support the immune system, making it a natural remedy for various health concerns.
